name: Chicken Kiev
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove bones and skin from chicken breasts and pound out to 1/8 inch thick.
2. Cut butter into quarters and lay one in the center of each chicken piece.
3. Evenly divide onions and parsley between breasts.
4. Roll each piece into a log and secure with a toothpick.
5. Mix eggs and water.
6. Roll each log in flour, then dip in egg wash and cover with bread crumbs.
7. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 1 hour or overnight.
8. Keep frozen until ready to cook.
9. Fry until brown, then bake at 375 degrees for 5 minutes.
